name: @rhombus-std/declare-by-depending.ttsc.e2e
description: End-to-end proof of host-side declare-by-depending stage selection (§100): drives the real ttsc over two fixtures with no explicit plugins — a di.transformer consumer whose nameof<T>() lowers via the host's transitive scan (di.transformer → primitives.transformer), and a di.core-only consumer left untouched (cores don't force-activate). Not published.
